description: One connection of 51 objects across two Relay pages (page size 50). Proves fetchAllPages reaches the page-two-only object and its exact GOLC identity footer, never treating page one alone as complete, and that a distinct earlier marker (page one, node 25) survives alongside it without collapsing (T-01-39).
